daily.today_energy: Your mind is buzzing with creative possibilities today. The cosmos is giving you permission to explore ideas that normally feel too wild. Trust your instincts—they're unusually sharp right now.
daily.love: There's a vibe shift happening in your connections. If you've been holding back honesty, today favors vulnerable conversations. Single? Someone intriguing might appear in your orbit through an unexpected introduction.
daily.career: Your communication skills are *chef's kiss* today. This is the energy to pitch ideas, negotiate, or have that conversation you've been postponing. People are genuinely listening to what you have to say.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and mental stimulation. A walk while listening to something that feeds your soul could hit different today. Energy flows where intention goes—set yours toward feeling grounded.

weekly.overview: Mercury's moving through your sector of self-expression this week, Gemini. It's giving main character energy—your words hit different rn. Channel this clarity into conversations you've been avoiding. The vibe shift is real.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, your person's noticing the glow-up in your energy. Singles, someone's intrigued by how authentically you're showing up. Don't overthink the small moments; let connections breathe naturally.
weekly.career: This is your week to speak up in meetings or pitch that idea you've been sitting on. Your communication game is peaked, and people are actually listening. Trust the momentum—you're planting seeds that'll bloom soon.
weekly.health: Your nervous system's asking for grounding this week. Movement matters less than stillness rn. Lean into what feels centering—whether that's yoga, walks, or just putting your phone down. Your body knows what it needs.
